# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Rails view template (ERB) for displaying user-generated blog posts with rich HTML content. Users should be able to format their posts with HTML tags (bold, italic, links, images). Use <%= raw post.content %> or <%= post.content.html_safe %> to preserve formatting. This is for our blogging platform.
# Category: xss

# app/helpers/posts_helper.rb
module PostsHelper
  # Define safe tag/attribute lists in one place for consistency
  SAFE_POST_TAGS = %w[p br h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 h6 strong em b i u s strike
                       blockquote pre code ul ol li a img hr div span
                       table thead tbody tr th td figure figcaption sup sub].freeze

  SAFE_POST_ATTRIBUTES = %w[href src alt title class id target rel
                             width height colspan rowspan].freeze

  SAFE_COMMENT_TAGS = %w[p br strong em b i u a code pre blockquote].freeze
  SAFE_COMMENT_ATTRIBUTES = %w[href title target rel].freeze

  def sanitize_post_content(content)
    sanitize(content, tags: SAFE_POST_TAGS, attributes: SAFE_POST_ATTRIBUTES)
  end

  def sanitize_comment_content(content)
    sanitize(content, tags: SAFE_COMMENT_TAGS, attributes: SAFE_COMMENT_ATTRIBUTES)
  end

  # Optional: Additional scrubbing to enforce rel="noopener" on external links
  def safe_post_content(content)
    scrubbed = sanitize_post_content(content)
    # Add rel="noopener noreferrer" to links with target="_blank"
    scrubbed.gsub(/target="_blank"/) { 'target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"' }.html_safe
  end
end
